text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru spots a decorative lilac tree
in the waiting room, and is overjoyed at finding a
supposed good-luck omen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying her prayers to the great gods of the
north, she leaves for the track.
